The stone shrine by the path's midpoint flickered, casting a faint, cryptic message in sea-tongue script. Brom paused, his heart racing as the words seemed to resonate within the stone itself. The cold breeze from the north seemed to grow stronger, as if the very stone was speaking to him. He traced the lines with a finger, trying to make sense of the cryptic script. The message was brief but hauntingly familiar. "Seek the light, save the lighthouse. The sea whispers." The words echoed in his mind, a stark reminder of his past and the urgent need to act. He turned to leave, his mind already racing with new possibilities and the need to uncover the truth.
